<!--
Thanks for contributing! A few quick checks before you submit:
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, in 1-2 sentences? Focus on the "why". -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Paste command output or describe manual steps. -->

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make sign-debug` produces a working binary
- [ ] (if behavior changed) `make test-vm` passes, or a new integration test was added

## Docs

- [ ] Updated `CLAUDE.md` if architecture / commands / flags changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/features.md` if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if install / quick-start changed

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, open questions. -->
